title: Withdrawing and using your super
description: When and how you can access your super and whether you need to pay tax on withdrawals.

child_links.description: The conditions of release that must be satisfied for legal superannuation withdrawals.

child_links.title: Retirement withdrawal - lump sum or income stream
child_links.description: The difference between a lump sum withdrawal of super and a retirement income stream and their tax consequences.

child_links.title: Relaxed commutation rules for legacy retirement products

child_links.title: Early access to super
child_links.description: Your super is for retirement, but you may be able to access it earlier on compassionate and other hardship grounds.
